purpose: GitHub-tracked metadata for visual crops whose binary files are R2 derived assets.

skipped_regions.caption_literal: documento que reproduce nuestro grabado, dirigido por el virrey, marqués de Loreto, al gobernador español.
skipped_regions.source_context: This is a reproduction of a 1784 letter from the Viceroy of Buenos Aires, Marquis de Loreto, to the Spanish governor Antonio Valdés y Bazán, concerning the administration of the Malvinas (Falkland) Islands.
